raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section constructs a causal chain—selective gate → robustness → leading approach—justified by a single ablation producing a 0.4 mAP drop; the logical validity of that attribution (one ablation, simulated channel, narrow margin) must be verified.","R1.3":"Load-bearing: the section characterises a 0.5 mAP@0.5 gain over CoBEVT as 'substantially improves' and draws a broad real-world robustness conclusion from a simulated-channel benchmark; the gap between the numerical evidence and the stated conclusions is the primary failure risk.","R1.4":"The novelty claim rests on a slender margin over prior SOTA (CoBEVT: +0.5/+0.8 mAP) and a qualitative backbone-compatibility observation; assessing whether this delta is meaningful enough to support the 'leading approach' framing is central to the review."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the review assess technical substance (soundness of reasoning, evidence-to-claim strength, and novelty of the margin), or is it focused on writing quality (sentence-level prose and clarity)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section constructs a causal chain—selective gate → robustness → leading approach—justified by a single ablation producing a 0.4 mAP drop; the logical validity of that attribution (one ablation, simulated channel, narrow margin) must be verified.
rationale.R1.3: Load-bearing: the section characterises a 0.5 mAP@0.5 gain over CoBEVT as 'substantially improves' and draws a broad real-world robustness conclusion from a simulated-channel benchmark; the gap between the numerical evidence and the stated conclusions is the primary failure risk.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty claim rests on a slender margin over prior SOTA (CoBEVT: +0.5/+0.8 mAP) and a qualitative backbone-compatibility observation; assessing whether this delta is meaningful enough to support the 'leading approach' framing is central to the review.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review assess technical substance (soundness of reasoning, evidence-to-claim strength, and novelty of the margin), or is it focused on writing quality (sentence-level prose and clarity)?
